# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 's3ArtifactUrl', description: 'URL of the artifact in S3')
        string(name: 'artifactoryArtifactUrl', description: 'URL of the artifact in Artifactory')
        string(name: 'httpArtifactUrl', description: 'URL of the artifact in HTTP server')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Download and Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def s3Artifact = httpRequest(url: params.s3ArtifactUrl)
                    def artifactoryArtifact = httpRequest(url: params.artifactoryArtifactUrl)
                    def httpArtifact = httpRequest(url: params.httpArtifactUrl)
                    
                    // Deploy to production servers
                    sh "deploy-to-production.sh ${s3Artifact.content} ${artifactoryArtifact.content} ${httpArtifact.content}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
